overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through the futuristic Night City. The journey begins in a dark tunnel, emerges into covered urban highways with graffiti-covered walls, passes under the California Ave intersection, navigates multi-level expressways with orange barriers, and continues through a mix of covered and open sections with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance. The clip ends on a covered highway with large directional signs pointing to Watson, Westbrook, and Japan Town districts.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban tunnel and underpass with graffiti walls

events.description: exiting dark tunnel into brighter covered underpass area
emerging from enclosed tunnel into wider underpass with visible overpass structures ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through the tunnel and emerging into the underpass, accelerating slightly

entered.detail: dark concrete tunnel walls with rough texture
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
large concrete overpass structure with Japanese characters visible

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark enclosed tunnel with rough concrete walls. As the vehicle emerges, the lighting transitions to reveal graffiti-covered walls and a concrete overpass structure ahead with Japanese signage. The space remains narrow and urban, with no pedestrians visible and sparse vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered intersection under California Ave overpass

events.description: passing under the California Ave street sign at intersection
making a right turn maneuver around a fenced corner

agents.ego_description: driving under the California Ave overpass and executing a right turn around a corner with metal fencing

notable_agents.action: dark SUV driving ahead through the intersection

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading California Ave suspended over road
large illuminated billboard showing product advertisement on right wall
white metal security fence blocking off construction or restricted area

segments.scene_description: The vehicle passes under the California Ave overpass, navigating through a covered intersection with large billboards on the right. The scene transitions as the vehicle makes a right turn around a corner lined with white metal fencing, moving from the enclosed underpass into a slightly more open area with industrial buildings visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level covered expressway with orange barriers

events.description: entering covered highway section with overhead glass panels and neon lighting
following traffic through covered highway with multiple lanes

agents.ego_description: cruising along the multi-level highway, maintaining steady speed behind other vehicles

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: bright orange plastic safety barriers lining the right side of the highway
complex network of concrete overpasses and highway ramps overhead
red neon light strips mounted on the ceiling of the covered section

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered expressway section characterized by orange safety barriers on the right and a complex network of overhead highway structures. Red neon light strips illuminate the ceiling, and the road stretches ahead with moderate traffic. The environment feels distinctly cyberpunk with its mix of concrete infrastructure and neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway intersection with distant skyscrapers

events.description: exiting covered highway into open area with direct sunlight and visible skyscrapers
transitioning from artificial neon lighting to bright natural sunlight

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the open highway section, approaching the Brookland intersection with skyscrapers visible ahead

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading Brookland suspended over intersection
tall futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers forming the city skyline in the distance
clear blue sky visible above the highway for the first time

segments.scene_description: The vehicle bursts out of the covered highway into a wide-open intersection marked by the Brookland street sign. Bright natural sunlight replaces the artificial neon, revealing a stunning view of futuristic skyscrapers towering in the distance. The road curves gently as the vehicle navigates through this transition zone between covered and open urban infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered highway canyon with concrete walls

events.description: entering narrow concrete canyon with high walls on right side
lighting shifts to warm artificial tones as vehicle enters deeply covered section

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow concrete canyon, following the vehicle ahead closely

notable_agents.action: white SUV driving ahead through the narrow passage

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with vertical ridges running along the right side of the road
linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on the ceiling of the covered section

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow concrete canyon with high ridged walls on the right and overhead structures blocking most of the sky. The lighting shifts to warm artificial tones from linear ceiling fixtures. This enclosed section creates a claustrophobic corridor effect as the vehicle follows the white SUV ahead, with the distant skyscrapers still visible but now framed by the concrete architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway with directional signage for city districts

events.description: entering final covered highway section with large directional signs overhead

agents.ego_description: cruising steadily under the large directional signs, maintaining lane position with other traffic

entered.detail: large green overhead sign with white text indicating directions to Watson, Westbrook, and Japan Town
ceiling with geometric grid pattern and embedded lighting panels
pedestrian walkway or service bridge running parallel to the highway on the right

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a covered highway with a distinctive grid-pattern ceiling and massive directional signs overhead pointing toward Watson, Westbrook, and Japan Town districts. The vehicle cruises steadily through this section, with an elevated walkway visible on the right and other vehicles sharing the multi-lane road. The lighting mixes artificial ceiling lights with natural light filtering through gaps, maintaining the cyberpunk aesthetic of the urban environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic urban landscape that shifts from dark, enclosed tunnels into bright open vistas before returning to a structured highway corridor. It begins in a dark concrete tunnel, emerging into a narrow urban space defined by graffiti-covered walls and Japanese signage. As the vehicle passes under the California Ave overpass and turns past white metal fencing, the scene transitions into a covered expressway illuminated by red neon strips and lined with orange safety barriers. The environment then bursts open into a sunlit intersection at Brookland, where the artificial light is replaced by bright daylight and a skyline of towering skyscrapers, before narrowing again into a claustrophobic concrete canyon with warm linear ceiling fixtures. Finally, the camera glides into a covered highway featuring a grid-pattern ceiling and massive directional signs pointing toward Watson, Westbrook, and Japan Town.
